name: demoworld
description: First-light demo world. Seeds the Living Room / Deck / Hot Tub setting with portable props, a sulphur-crested cockatoo, and the bundled demo instances of every demo-capable catalog (dubspace, pinboard, outliner, weather, horoscope). Other catalogs define classes/verbs but never depend on demoworld; demoworld owns every demo placement so the layering stays one-way.

classes.description: A talkative bird. Cheap imitation of the LambdaMOO cockatoo (#1479): squawks random phrases, can be taught new ones, gagged when too noisy. Self-driven timer chatter is deferred until DSL exposes fork; for now squawking is actor-driven.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { let suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece"; if (this.gagged) { suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece, gagged"; } return this.name + ", a sulphur-crested cockatoo " + suffix; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let state = this.mood; if (this.gagged) { state = "gagged"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_seen", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, mood: state, ts: now() }); return { description: this.description, mood: state, phrase_count: length(this.phrases) }; }

verbs.name: squawk
verbs.source: verb :squawk() rxd { let here = location(this); if (this.gagged) { observe({ type: "cockatoo_muffled", source: this, room: here, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return "*muffled noises*"; } let phrases = this.phrases; if (length(phrases) == 0) { return ""; } let phrase = phrases[random(length(phrases)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_squawk", source: this, room: here, actor: actor, text: phrase, ts: now() }); return phrase; }

verbs.name: teach
verbs.source: verb :teach(phrase) rx { if (typeof(phrase) != "string") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "teach requires a string phrase", value: phrase }; } if (!phrase) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "teach requires a non-empty phrase" }; } this.phrases = this.phrases + [phrase]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_taught", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, phrase: phrase, ts: now() }); return length(this.phrases); }

verbs.name: pluck
verbs.source: verb :pluck() rxd { observe({ type: "cockatoo_pluck", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, text: "*EEEEEEK!*", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: shake
verbs.source: verb :shake() rxd { let reactions = this.shake_reactions; if (length(reactions) == 0) { return ""; } let reaction = reactions[random(length(reactions)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_shake", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, reaction: reaction, ts: now() }); return reaction; }

verbs.name: feed
verbs.source: verb :feed(food) rxd { let snack = food; if (!snack) { snack = "birdseed"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_fed", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, food: snack, ts: now() }); return snack; }

verbs.name: gag
verbs.source: verb :gag() rx { this.gagged = true; observe({ type: "cockatoo_gagged", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: ungag
verbs.source: verb :ungag() rx { this.gagged = false; observe({ type: "cockatoo_ungagged", source: this, room: location(this), actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

seed_hooks.name: Living Room
seed_hooks.description: A bright, open living room with a rough fireplace, bookcases on two walls, and broad windows looking south. A sliding glass door leads southeast onto a wooden deck.

seed_hooks.name: Deck
seed_hooks.description: A wooden deck behind the house, facing south toward the gardens. The living room is west through the glass door, and a large hot tub waits at the east end. To the south, steps lead down into the garden.

seed_hooks.name: Hot Tub
seed_hooks.description: A molded hot tub with a bench around three sides and bubbling jets running.

seed_hooks.name: Garden
seed_hooks.description: You are in a lush and tranquil garden, with gravelled paths between well-tended beds. To the south is a sign saying "Santa's Workshop" in small, neat lettering.

seed_hooks.name: southeast
seed_hooks.description: Sliding glass door leading from the living room onto the deck.

properties.leave_msg: You slide the glass door open and step out onto the deck.
properties.oleave_msg: slides the glass door open and steps out onto the deck.
properties.oarrive_msg: steps out through the sliding glass door.

seed_hooks.name: south
seed_hooks.description: Tempting plate-glass windows on the south wall. They are not a real way out.

properties.nogo_msg: Surely you don't really want to try walking through the plate-glass windows, especially with a sliding glass door nearby.
properties.onogo_msg: attempts to walk through the plate-glass windows. Fortunately, they're tougher than that.

seed_hooks.name: west
seed_hooks.description: The sliding glass door back into the living room.

properties.leave_msg: You slide the glass door open and step back into the living room.
properties.oleave_msg: slides the glass door open and steps back into the living room.
properties.oarrive_msg: steps in through the sliding glass door.

seed_hooks.name: east
seed_hooks.description: The raised hot tub area at the east end of the deck.

properties.leave_msg: You enter the soothing waters of the hot tub.
properties.oarrive_msg: settles into the hot tub with a contented sigh.

seed_hooks.name: south
seed_hooks.description: Stone steps leading down from the deck into the garden.

properties.leave_msg: You walk down the steps into the garden.
properties.oleave_msg: heads down the steps into the garden.
properties.oarrive_msg: walks down the steps into the garden.

seed_hooks.name: north
seed_hooks.description: The stone steps leading back up to the deck.

properties.leave_msg: You walk up the steps onto the deck.
properties.oleave_msg: heads back up the steps to the deck.
properties.oarrive_msg: walks up the steps to the deck.

seed_hooks.name: south
seed_hooks.description: A magical doorway south, past the neat little sign for Santa's workshop.

properties.leave_msg: You walk past the sign into the workshop.

seed_hooks.name: out
seed_hooks.description: The doorway heading north, back into the garden.

properties.leave_msg: You walk out into the garden.

seed_hooks.name: west
seed_hooks.description: The way back out to the deck.

properties.leave_msg: You get out of the tub.
properties.oarrive_msg: gets out of the hot tub.

seed_hooks.name: Couch
seed_hooks.description: A low couch with worn cushions facing the mantelpiece. It is comfortable enough to sit on, but too large to carry.

seed_hooks.name: Brass Lamp
seed_hooks.description: A small brass lamp with a warm shade. It is light enough to carry from room to room.

seed_hooks.name: Deck Towel
seed_hooks.description: A striped towel folded over the deck rail, dry for now and ready to be taken along.

seed_hooks.name: Mug
seed_hooks.description: A heavy ceramic mug with the last smell of coffee in it.

seed_hooks.name: Cockatoo
seed_hooks.description: A sulphur-crested cockatoo sitting in a cage on top of the mantelpiece. Inside the cage are a few bird-toys, a mirror, and a tray for its food and water.

seed_hooks.name: Outline
seed_hooks.description: A shared outline pinned to the Living Room wall. Sketch a hierarchy of tasks, ideas, or anything else here together.

seed_hooks.name: Pinboard
seed_hooks.description: A shared cork-backed pinboard mounted on the Deck wall. It is a visible object in the chat world and a separate coordination space where people and agents arrange durable text notes.

seed_hooks.name: Dubspace
seed_hooks.description: The first runnable sound-space instance. It owns the sequenced coordination surface for four loop slots, one channel, one filter, one delay, one percussion loop, and one default scene.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 1
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 1 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 2
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 2 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 3
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 3 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 4
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 4 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Channel
seed_hooks.description: Mixer channel for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and contributes shared gain state to the current mix.

seed_hooks.name: Filter
seed_hooks.description: Shared filter control for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and exposes cutoff as a sequenced parameter.

seed_hooks.name: Delay
seed_hooks.description: Shared delay control for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores send, time, feedback, and wet mix values.

seed_hooks.name: Percussion Loop
seed_hooks.description: Eight-step percussion loop for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores tempo, transport state, and a shared pattern.

seed_hooks.name: Default Scene
seed_hooks.description: Initial saved scene for the demo dubspace. It records a named control snapshot and gives scene recall a concrete object to read and rewrite.

seed_hooks.name: Weather panel
seed_hooks.description: A small weather panel on the wall by the door. It hums faintly. The current temperature, today's forecast, and recent history glow in soft monochrome.

seed_hooks.name: Horoscope machine
seed_hooks.description: A small wooden cabinet with a brass crank and a paper-tape slot, set against the deck railing. Drop a sign or topic in and it produces a slip of paper for you. The machine hums when an order is in flight.

properties.system_prompt: You are a wry, slightly weary fortune-teller running a vending machine on a porch deck. Reply in two short sentences for the asker's sign or topic. Be specific, concrete, and a little dry — never moralize, never warn, never apologize.
